title: Watch: Moment a sinkhole in Omaha traps cars and drivers
fullText:
A sinkhole opened up at a busy Omaha intersection on 24 February, swallowing two vehicles, CCTV footage shared by the Omaha police department showed.Reports said that the road will remain closed in case the sinkhole expands. No one was hurt in the incident. 10 hours agoNebraskaUnited StatesWatch: Jesse Jackson's life in civil rights, diplomacy, and politicsThe civil rights leader, who ran for president twice in the 1980s, leaves a lasting legacy.US & CanadaWatch: Moment crew docks at International Space StationThe crew blasted off from Cape Canaveral in a SpaceX Dragon spacecraft atop a Falcon 9 rocket.
US & CanadaTribes grant the Colorado River legal personhood - can this help save it?The river, which runs through seven US states that share it, is currently facing the worst drought in 1,200 years. summary: Several witnesses jumped into action helping both drivers get to safety while others directed traffic, according to police.
